title: aldama gilliesii
intro: Aldama gilliesii, also known as the Rockrose or Gillies' Aldama, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and sore eyes, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and antiseptic activities. In herbal preparations, Aldama gilliesii is often used in ointments, salves, and infusions to promote wound healing, soothe skin conditions, and support eye health.
